scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync('client/dist','dist',{recursive:true});"
